title: mimulus bigelovii
intro: Mimulus bigelovii, also known as Sky Pilot, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phrymaceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Mimulus bigelovii are thought to include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and stress levels. Herbal preparations of Mimulus bigelovii can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and infusions, often used to support respiratory health and promote relaxation.
